---
title: "CondenScreen R Script"
output: html_notebook
author: Dylan Poch
---

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 


```{r}
#PACKAGES
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Packages are automatically installed if missing to ensure reproducibility

required_packages <- c("tidyverse", "knitr", "DBI", "ggpval", "openxlsx",
                       "EnvStats", "ggpubr", "psych", "plotrix", "BSDA",
                       "ggrepel", "data.table", "progress", "shiny", "plotly",
                       "htmltools", "sass", "rlang", "gridExtra", "ggplate",
                       "writexl", "httr2", "reticulate", "jsonlite", "patchwork")


installed <- rownames(installed.packages())

for (pkg in required_packages) {
  if (!pkg %in% installed) {
    message("Installing package: ", pkg)
    install.packages(pkg, dependencies = TRUE)
  }
  suppressPackageStartupMessages(
  library(pkg, character.only = TRUE)
  )
}
```

```{r}
# CondenScreen GUI 
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Function to generate well coordinates
generate_well_coordinates <- function(rows, cols) {
  expand.grid(Row = LETTERS[1:rows], Col = 1:cols) %>%
    mutate(
      Col = as.integer(Col),
      Well = paste0(Row, sprintf("%02d", Col)),
      Condition = "None"
    )
}

# ---------------------------
# UI
# ---------------------------
ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("CondenScreen Well Selection:"),
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      selectInput(
        "plate_type", "Select Plate Type:",
        choices = c(
          "6-well"   = "2x3",
          "12-well"  = "3x4",
          "24-well"  = "4x6",
          "96-well"  = "8x12",
          "384-well" = "16x24"
        )
      ),

      radioButtons(
        "condition", "Select Condition:",
        choices = c("Positive Control", "Negative Control", "Test Condition", "Unselect")
      ),

      textInput("pos_control_name", "Positive Control Name:", value = "Positive Ctrl"),
      textInput("neg_control_name", "Negative Control Name:", value = "Negative Ctrl"),

      # NEW: Chemical vs Genetic screen toggle (button)
      actionButton("screen_toggle", "Screen: Chemical", style = "width: 100%"),

      # Existing: signal toggle
      actionButton("signal_toggle", "Signal: OFF", style = "width: 100%"),

      actionButton("clear", "Clear Selections"),
      hr(),

      strong("Save Directory:"),
      div(
        style = "display: flex; margin-bottom: 10px;",
        textInput("save_dir", NULL, value = paste0(getwd(), "/"), width = "100%")
      ),

      textInput(
        "save_filename",
        "Save File Name: (end with .csv; Final analysis will be in YOURFILENAME_results.csv)",
        value = "well_selection.csv"
      ),

      strong("Input Directory:"),
      div(
        style = "display: flex; margin-bottom: 10px;",
        textInput("input_dir", NULL, value = paste0(getwd(), "/"), width = "100%"),
        actionButton("parent_input_dir", "↑", style = "margin-left: 5px;"),
        actionButton("reset_input_dir", "Reset", style = "margin-left: 5px;")
      ),

      hr(),
      downloadButton("download", "Download Selection"),
      actionButton("exit_app", "Exit", class = "btn-danger", style = "width: 100%;")
    ),

    mainPanel(
      plotlyOutput("plate_plot"),
      tableOutput("selected_wells")
    )
  )
)

# ---------------------------
# SERVER
# ---------------------------
server <- function(input, output, session) {

  # Reactive values for directories (metadata)
  save_dir <- reactiveVal(getwd())
  input_dir <- reactiveVal(file.path(getwd(), "data"))

  observeEvent(input$save_dir, {
    if (dir.exists(input$save_dir)) save_dir(input$save_dir)
  })

  observeEvent(input$input_dir, {
    if (dir.exists(input$input_dir)) input_dir(input$input_dir)
  })

  observeEvent(input$parent_input_dir, {
    current <- input_dir()
    parent <- dirname(current)
    input_dir(parent)
    updateTextInput(session, "input_dir", value = parent)
  })

  observeEvent(input$reset_input_dir, {
    default <- file.path(getwd(), "data")
    input_dir(default)
    updateTextInput(session, "input_dir", value = default)
  })

  # Plate dimensions
  plate_dims <- reactive({
    dims <- strsplit(input$plate_type, "x")[[1]]
    list(rows = as.integer(dims[1]), cols = as.integer(dims[2]))
  })

  # Main data store
  well_data <- reactiveVal(data.frame(Row = character(), Col = integer(), Well = character(), Condition = character()))

  # Initialize / regenerate on plate type changes
  observeEvent(input$plate_type, {
    dims <- plate_dims()
    df <- generate_well_coordinates(dims$rows, dims$cols)
    well_data(df)
  }, ignoreInit = TRUE)

  observe({
    if (nrow(well_data()) == 0) {
      dims <- plate_dims()
      df <- generate_well_coordinates(dims$rows, dims$cols)
      well_data(df)
    }
  })

  # Chemical vs Genetic toggle
  screen_type <- reactiveVal("Chemical")
  observeEvent(input$screen_toggle, {
    screen_type(ifelse(screen_type() == "Chemical", "Genetic", "Chemical"))
    updateActionButton(session, "screen_toggle", label = paste0("Screen: ", screen_type()))
  })

  # Signal toggle
  signal_status <- reactiveVal(FALSE)
  observeEvent(input$signal_toggle, {
    signal_status(!signal_status())
    updateActionButton(session, "signal_toggle",
                       label = ifelse(signal_status(), "Signal: ON", "Signal: OFF"))
  })

  # Map UI condition to internal label
  normalize_condition <- function(cond) {
    if (identical(cond, "Unselect")) return("None")
    cond
  }

  # Plot
  output$plate_plot <- renderPlotly({
    df <- well_data()

    plot_ly(
      df,
      x = ~factor(Col, levels = sort(unique(Col))),
      y = ~factor(Row, levels = rev(unique(Row))),
      type = "scatter",
      mode = "markers",
      key = ~Well,  # <<< CRITICAL: stable identity so click/select never maps to wrong well
      marker = list(
        size = 15,
        color = ~case_when(
          Condition == "Positive Control" ~ "green",
          Condition == "Negative Control" ~ "red",
          Condition == "Test Condition" ~ "black",
          TRUE ~ "gray"
        )
      ),
      source = "plateplot"
    ) %>%
      layout(
        xaxis = list(title = "Column"),
        yaxis = list(title = "Row"),
        showlegend = FALSE,
        dragmode = "select"
      )
  })

  # Box select: use key (Well) not x/y
  observeEvent(event_data("plotly_selected", source = "plateplot"), {
    selected_data <- event_data("plotly_selected", source = "plateplot")
    if (is.null(selected_data) || is.null(selected_data$key)) return()

    df <- well_data()
    new_cond <- normalize_condition(input$condition)
    wells_clicked <- as.character(selected_data$key)

    df$Condition[df$Well %in% wells_clicked] <- new_cond
    well_data(df)
  })

  # Click select: use key (Well) not x/y
  observeEvent(event_data("plotly_click", source = "plateplot"), {
    click_data <- event_data("plotly_click", source = "plateplot")
    if (is.null(click_data) || is.null(click_data$key)) return()

    df <- well_data()
    new_cond <- normalize_condition(input$condition)
    well_clicked <- as.character(click_data$key)

    df$Condition[df$Well == well_clicked] <- new_cond
    well_data(df)
  })

  # Table (with renamed controls)
  output$selected_wells <- renderTable({
    well_data() %>%
      mutate(Condition = case_when(
        Condition == "Positive Control" ~ input$pos_control_name,
        Condition == "Negative Control" ~ input$neg_control_name,
        Condition == "None" ~ NA_character_,
        TRUE ~ Condition
      ))
  })

  # Download: includes plate dims + screen type
  output$download <- downloadHandler(
    filename = function() input$save_filename,
    content = function(file) {

      df <- well_data() %>%
        mutate(Condition = case_when(
          Condition == "Positive Control" ~ input$pos_control_name,
          Condition == "Negative Control" ~ input$neg_control_name,
          Condition == "None" ~ NA_character_,
          TRUE ~ Condition
        ))

      dims <- plate_dims()

      settings_df <- data.frame(
        PlateType = input$plate_type,         # e.g. "16x24"
        PlateRows = dims$rows,
        PlateCols = dims$cols,
        PlateWells = dims$rows * dims$cols,

        ScreenType = screen_type(),           # "Chemical" / "Genetic"
        SaveDirectory = save_dir(),           # metadata
        InputDirectory = input_dir(),         # metadata
        SignalStatus = ifelse(signal_status(), "ON", "OFF"),
        PositiveControlName = input$pos_control_name,
        NegativeControlName = input$neg_control_name,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )

      final_df <- cbind(settings_df, df)

      # (Optional) create SaveDirectory on disk, but the browser download won't use it.
      target_dir <- save_dir()
      if (!dir.exists(target_dir)) dir.create(target_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

      write.csv(final_df, file, row.names = FALSE)
    }
  )

  # Clear selections
  observeEvent(input$clear, {
    df <- well_data()
    df$Condition <- "None"
    well_data(df)
  })

  # Exit button
  observeEvent(input$exit_app, {
    stopApp()
  })

  session$onSessionEnded(function() stopApp())
}

# Run app
shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)
```


```{r}
#EDIT: Add path to recently saved .csv file:
#############################################################  
#Make sure all pathways use foward slash (/)!
#save_Location <- "/home/userX/pathsource/"
save_Location <- "/Users/dylan/Documents/Bioinformatics/condenscreen/Condenscreen-v1.2/DownloadCondenScreen/"
file_Location<- save_Location
#############################################################

dfSelection <-  fread(paste0(save_Location, "well_selection.csv"))

#Add trailing slash, if necessary:
add_trailing_slash <- function(filePath) {
  # Replace backslashes and double slashes with forward slashes
  filePath <- gsub("\\\\+", "/", filePath)  # replaces \ and \\ with /
  filePath <- gsub("/+", "/", filePath)     # collapses multiple / into a single /

  # Ensure exactly one trailing slash
  filePath <- sub("/?$", "/", filePath)

  return(filePath)
}


image_Save_Location <- add_trailing_slash(dfSelection$SaveDirectory[1])
file_Location <- add_trailing_slash(dfSelection$InputDirectory[1])
assayType <- dfSelection$SignalStatus[1]
pos_Ctrl <- dfSelection$PositiveControlName[1]
neg_Ctrl <- dfSelection$NegativeControlName[1]

rows <- dfSelection$PlateRows[1]
cols <- dfSelection$PlateCols[1]
plateSize <- dfSelection$PlateWells[1]
ChemVGene <- dfSelection$ScreenType[1]

#Edit: Change string parsing to match the specific naming convention you used while naming the CellProfiler output
#UNLESS CHANGED FILENAME PATTERNS IN CELLPROFILER, LEAVE AS IS:
#Change recursive = TRUE to FALSE if you don't wish to search through all sub-directories of your current directory
#############################################################

#file_paths <- dir(file_Location, pattern = "*.FociQuant.*", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
file_paths <- list.files(file_Location, pattern="pharmakon", full.names=TRUE, recursive=TRUE, ignore.case=TRUE)

#############################################################

# Check if the file exists
path_to_batchScript <- paste0(file_Location, "process_batch.R")

if (file.exists(path_to_batchScript)) {
  cat("The batch script exists. Success!\n")
} else {
  cat("The batch script file does not exist. Try downloading directly into your selected file_Location \n")
}

# Save file paths to disk so each batch can access them
saveRDS(file_paths, file.path(file_Location, "file_paths.rds"))

batch_size <- 20
total_files <- length(file_paths)
stopifnot(total_files > 0)  # fail early instead of launching nothing

total_batches <- ceiling(total_files / batch_size)

script_path <- file.path(file_Location, "process_batch.R")
stopifnot(file.exists(script_path))

for (i in 1:total_batches) {
  start_idx <- (i - 1) * batch_size + 1
  end_idx   <- min(i * batch_size, total_files)

  cat("Launching batch", i, "of", total_batches, "\n")

res <- system2(
  command = "Rscript",
  args = c(
    shQuote(script_path),
    start_idx,
    end_idx,
    i,
    shQuote(file.path(file_Location, "file_paths.rds")),
    shQuote(file_Location)
  ),
  stdout = TRUE,
  stderr = TRUE
)

cat(paste(res, collapse="\n"))

  gc()
}
 
# After all batches are done, combine if needed
cat("All batches completed. Combining results...\n")

# List all batch files
batch_files <- list.files(file_Location, 
                         pattern = "^batch_\\d+\\.csv$",
                         full.names = TRUE)
# Combine all batches into a final result
combined_data <- rbindlist(lapply(batch_files, fread))
fwrite(combined_data, paste0(file_Location, "final_combined_result.csv"))

cat("Processing complete!\n")


#Note: Will create tdTomato and Area columns even if empty for consistent DataFrame formatting

combined_data <- rbindlist(lapply(batch_files, fread), fill = TRUE)

# --- Make tdTomato/Area optional but stable (always present, always numeric) ---
ensure_numeric <- function(DT, col) {
  if (!col %in% names(DT)) DT[, (col) := NA_real_]
  DT[, (col) := suppressWarnings(as.numeric(get(col)))]
  invisible(NULL)
}

ensure_numeric(combined_data, "Intensity_IntegratedIntensity_tdTomato")
ensure_numeric(combined_data, "AreaShape_Area")

has_td_int  <- "Intensity_IntegratedIntensity_tdTomato" %in% names(combined_data) &&
               any(!is.na(combined_data$Intensity_IntegratedIntensity_tdTomato))
has_td_area <- "AreaShape_Area" %in% names(combined_data) &&
               any(!is.na(combined_data$AreaShape_Area))

has_td <- has_td_int || has_td_area

```


```{r}
# STRING EXTRACTION FOR WELL/PLATE NAMING CONVENTIONS 

# Vectorized version
extract_info_vectorized <- function(combinedDF) {
  
  # Define patterns
#================================================================
  pattern_filename <- "([A-Za-z0-9]+)_([A-Za-z0-9]+)_s(\\d+)_w\\d+"
  pattern_pathname <- "\\d{8}-([A-Za-z0-9]+)_Plate_\\d+"
#================================================================
  # Extract all matches at once using vectorized operations
  matches <- str_match(combinedDF$FileName_GFP, pattern_filename)
  
  # Initialize result tibble with extracted values
  result <- tibble(
    plate_Num = matches[, 2],
    Well_Num = matches[, 3],
    Image_Num = matches[, 4]
  )
  
  return(result)
}


# Apply the vectorized function directly to the dataframe
extractedInfo <- extract_info_vectorized(combined_data)

combined_data[, c("plate_Num", "Well_Num", "Imagecopy_Num") := extractedInfo]

combined_Df <- combined_data


```


```{r}
# INDIVIDUAL CONDITION/CONTROL STATISTICS 
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#[OPTIONAL] Filter out bottom 75% (to control for a transfection efficiency of 1:4)
#Filter conditions that leave < 5 cells/image (too much variance for meaningful interpretation)
combined_Df <- combined_Df %>%
  
  group_by(plate_Num, Well_Num, ImageNumber) %>%
  
  arrange(Children_GFP_foci_Count, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  
  #---------------------------------------
  #COMMENT OUT UNLESS YOU WANT TO TAKE ONLY THE TOP 25% OF CELLS TO ACCOUNT FOR TRANSFECTION EFFICIENCY!!!
  # mutate(nlen = ceiling(n() * 0.75)) %>%
  # filter(row_number() > nlen) %>%
  #--------------------------------------

  filter(n() > 5) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(plate_Num, Well_Num, Imagecopy_Num) %>%
  
  mutate(
    Nuclei_Number = n(),
    mean_Nuc_Foci = mean(Children_GFP_foci_Count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  
  ungroup()

#Combine with assigned conditions:
dfSelection <- dfSelection %>% rename(Well_Num = Well).
combined_Df <- merge(combined_Df, dfSelection[, c('SignalStatus', 'Condition', 'Well_Num')], by = "Well_Num")

combined_Df <- combined_Df %>% 
  mutate(Condition = ifelse(Condition == "Test Condition", Well_Num, Condition)) %>%
  filter(complete.cases(Condition))

#Calculate aggregate statistics for each condition:
combined_Df<- combined_Df %>%
          group_by(plate_Num, Well_Num) %>%
          # Filter out top image in case of screen aberration
          mutate(summary_condition = if_else(mean_Nuc_Foci > 1, mean_Nuc_Foci < max(mean_Nuc_Foci), TRUE)) %>%
          filter(summary_condition) %>%
         summarise(
            Nuclei_Number = mean(Nuclei_Number, na.rm = TRUE),
            Avg_Foci      = mean(mean_Nuc_Foci, na.rm = TRUE),
          
            tdTomato_Area = if (has_td_area) mean(AreaShape_Area, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
            tdTomato      = if (has_td_int)  mean(Intensity_IntegratedIntensity_tdTomato, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
          
            AssayType  = unique(SignalStatus),
            Condition  = unique(Condition),
            .groups = "drop"
          )

#Determine control statistics:
pos_Ctrl_DF <- combined_Df %>%
  group_by(plate_Num) %>%
  filter(Condition == pos_Ctrl) %>%
  summarize(
    mean_Pos_SD   = sd(Avg_Foci, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_Pos_Foci = mean(Avg_Foci, na.rm=TRUE),
    cv_Pos        = cv(Avg_Foci) * 100,

    tdTomato_Pos_Area      = if (has_td_area) mean(tdTomato_Area, na.rm=TRUE) else NA_real_,
    Nuclear_Pos_TdTomato   = if (has_td_int)  mean(tdTomato, na.rm=TRUE)      else NA_real_,
    .groups = "drop"
  )


neg_Ctrl_DF <- combined_Df %>%
  group_by(plate_Num) %>%
  filter(Condition == neg_Ctrl) %>%
  summarize(
    mean_Neg_SD   = sd(Avg_Foci, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_Neg_Foci = mean(Avg_Foci, na.rm = TRUE),
    cv_Neg        = cv(Avg_Foci) * 100,

    tdTomato_Neg_Area    = if (has_td_area) mean(tdTomato_Area, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    Nuclear_Neg_TdTomato = if (has_td_int)  mean(tdTomato, na.rm = TRUE)      else NA_real_,

    .groups = "drop"
  )

plate_Summary <- merge(pos_Ctrl_DF, neg_Ctrl_DF)

plate_Summary <- plate_Summary %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    ZPrime_Score = round(
      1 - (3 * (.data$mean_Pos_SD + .data$mean_Neg_SD) /
             abs(.data$mean_Pos_Foci - .data$mean_Neg_Foci)),
      2
    )
  )

SB_Plate <- plate_Summary %>% group_by(plate_Num) %>%
  mutate(
    SB_Plate = ifelse(
      unique(assayType) == "OFF", 
      mean_Neg_Foci / mean_Pos_Foci, 
      mean_Pos_Foci / mean_Neg_Foci
    )
  )


#EXPORT PLATE SUMMARY:
plate_Summary$ZPrime_Score <- ZPrime_Score[[1]]
plate_Summary$SB_Plate <- SB_Plate$SB_Plate

p_ctrls <- combined_Df %>% filter( Condition == pos_Ctrl) %>%
  group_by(plate_Num) %>%
     summarise(Control = paste0(pos_Ctrl), across(c( Nuclei_Number, Avg_Foci, tdTomato), mean, na.rm = TRUE), Condition = pos_Ctrl)


n_ctrls <- combined_Df %>% filter( Condition == neg_Ctrl) %>% 
  group_by(plate_Num) %>%
     summarise(Control = paste0(neg_Ctrl), across(c(Nuclei_Number, Avg_Foci, tdTomato), mean, na.rm = TRUE), Condition = neg_Ctrl)

#Export controls summary:
ctrls <- rbind(p_ctrls, n_ctrls)

#Combined main dataframe: 
combined_Df <- merge(combined_Df, plate_Summary[, c("plate_Num", "ZPrime_Score")], by = "plate_Num" )



  
```


```{r}
# NORMALIZED EFFECTS & CYTOTOXICITY AND MORPHOLOGY ANALYSIS
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

#Creates a temp dataframe to not write over original
 temp_stats_Df<- combined_Df %>%
  # Remove controls
  filter(Condition == Well_Num) %>%
  
  # Group by plate number
  group_by(plate_Num) %>%
  
  # Calculate percent change relative to plate
  mutate(
    PercentChange = ifelse(
      `AssayType` == "OFF",
      ((mean(Avg_Foci) - Avg_Foci) / mean(Avg_Foci)) * 100,
      ((Avg_Foci - mean(Avg_Foci)) / mean(Avg_Foci)) * 100
    ),
    
    # Calculate the mean and standard deviation of each plate (based on PercentChange)
    mean_percentEffect = mean(PercentChange),
    SD_percentEffect = sd(PercentChange),
  
    # Calculate Z-scores for test conditions specific to each plate
    ZScore = (PercentChange - mean_percentEffect) / SD_percentEffect,
  
    # Calculate normalized differences for nuclear area, form factor, and cell count
    #NuclearAreaDiff = (tdTomato - mean(tdTomato)) / mean(tdTomato) * 100,
    tdTomato_Diff = (tdTomato - mean(tdTomato)) / mean(tdTomato) * 100,
    CellCountDiff = (Nuclei_Number - mean(Nuclei_Number)) / mean(Nuclei_Number) * 100
  )

#Remove any duplicated columns up till now 

#OPTIONAL -- Can have a more detailed view on cytotoxicity based on cell count and nuclear health:
#Ceullular Health Function (as function of cell density, nuclear area, and nuclear formfactor/morphological differences)
# temp_stats_Df$Viability <- temp_stats_Df %>% group_by(plate_Num, Well_Num) %>%
#   
#   # summarize(Viability =
#   #   CellCountDiff + ((100 + CellCountDiff) / 100) * mean(NuclearAreaDiff, tdTomato_Diff)) %>% 
#   #    pull(Viability)
#   summarize(Viability =
#     CellCountDiff)

temp_stats_Df <- temp_stats_Df %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(Viability = CellCountDiff)


```



```{r}
# B-SCORE CALCULATION (CONTROLS FOR POSITIONAL EFFECTS) 
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

BScore_func <- function(df, rows, cols,
                        effect_col = "PercentChange",
                        well_col   = "Well_Num") {

  temp_df <- df

  # Full plate indexing
  row_levels <- LETTERS[1:rows]
  col_levels <- 1:cols

  # Parse wells like A01, B12, etc.
  well <- as.character(temp_df[[well_col]])
  r <- substr(well, 1, 1)
  cnum <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(sub("^[A-Za-z]+", "", well)))

  keep <- !is.na(r) & !is.na(cnum) & r %in% row_levels & cnum %in% col_levels
  if (!any(keep)) {
    return(dplyr::tibble(Well_Num = character(0), BScore = numeric(0), BZ_Score = numeric(0)))
  }

  # Build full plate matrix
  mtx <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = rows, ncol = cols,
                dimnames = list(row_levels, as.character(col_levels)))

  eff <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(temp_df[[effect_col]]))

  # Fill matrix (vectorized)
  mtx[cbind(match(r[keep], row_levels), match(cnum[keep], col_levels))] <- eff[keep]

  # Median polish + MAD scaling (B-score)
  bmat <- tryCatch({
    mp <- stats::medpolish(mtx, trace.iter = FALSE)
    resid <- mp$residuals
    MAD <- stats::mad(resid, constant = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
    if (is.na(MAD) || MAD == 0) MAD <- 1
    resid / MAD
  }, error = function(e) {
    # Fallback: impute missing with plate median and retry
    fill <- stats::median(mtx, na.rm = TRUE)
    if (is.na(fill)) fill <- 0
    mtx[is.na(mtx)] <- fill

    mp <- stats::medpolish(mtx, trace.iter = FALSE)
    resid <- mp$residuals
    MAD <- stats::mad(resid, constant = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
    if (is.na(MAD) || MAD == 0) MAD <- 1
    resid / MAD
  })

  # Convert to tibble for wells present in this df
  out <- expand.grid(
    Row = row_levels,
    Col = col_levels,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  out$Well_Num <- paste0(out$Row, sprintf("%02d", out$Col))
  out$BScore   <- as.vector(bmat)

  out <- dplyr::as_tibble(out) %>%
    dplyr::filter(.data$Well_Num %in% unique(well[keep])) %>%
    dplyr::select(.data$Well_Num, .data$BScore)

  # BZ-score (within-plate normalization of B-score)
  mu <- mean(out$BScore, na.rm = TRUE)
  sdv <- stats::sd(out$BScore, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (is.na(sdv) || sdv == 0) sdv <- 1

  out <- out %>%
    dplyr::mutate(BZ_Score = (.data$BScore - mu) / sdv)

  out
}

# ---- RUN B-SCORE ONLY WHEN:
# (1) assayType == "OFF" AND (2) plateSize >= 96
# Should not use BZ-Score if plate size is smaller than 96 wells
if (assayType == "OFF" && plateSize >= 96) {

bs_res <- temp_stats_Df %>%
  filter(Condition == Well_Num) %>%
  group_by(plate_Num) %>%
  nest() %>%
  mutate(bscores = map(data, ~{
    out <- BScore_func(.x, rows = rows, cols = cols)
    out$plate_Num <- unique(.x$plate_Num)
    out
  })) %>%
  select(-data) %>%     # ← DROP IT HERE
  unnest(bscores)

  
  # Join back safely by plate + well (no row-order assumptions)
 temp_stats_Df <- temp_stats_Df %>%
  left_join(bs_res, by = c("plate_Num", "Well_Num")) %>%
  rename(BZScore = BZ_Score)

} else {
  # Explicitly create columns so downstream code doesn't break
  temp_stats_Df$BScore  <- NA_real_
  temp_stats_Df$BZScore <- NA_real_

  if (assayType == "OFF" && plateSize < 96) {
    message("Skipping B-score: plate size < 96 wells (medpolish is unstable with too few wells).")
  }
}
 
 

 
```




```{r}
# EXPORT PLATE FIGURES (OPTIONAL, CAN COMMENT OUT) 
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Define path
sub_dir <- paste0(file_Location,"Plate_Figures/") 

# Create subdirectory
if (!dir.exists(sub_dir)) {
  dir.create(sub_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  print("Subdirectory created successfully!")
} else {
  print("Subdirectory already exists.")
}


for (plate in seq_len(length(unique(combined_Df$plate_Num)))){
  plate_List <- unique(combined_Df$plate_Num)
  sub_df <- subset(combined_Df, plate_Num == plate_List[plate])

   nuc_plate <- plate_plot(
    data = sub_df,
    position = Well_Num,
    value = Avg_Foci,
    plate_size = plateSize,
    label = round(Avg_Foci, 0),
    title = paste(plate_List[plate], ", Avg. Foci/Condition:", sep = ""),
    title_size = 14,
    label_size = 1.6,
    colour = c("#FF0000", "#006600", "#006600", "#00CC00", "#00FF00")
   
  )

    
    cell_plate <- plate_plot(
    data = sub_df,
    position = Well_Num,
    value = Nuclei_Number,
    plate_size = plateSize,
    # label = round(Nuclei_Number),
    title = paste(plate_List[plate], ", Avg. Cell Count/Condition:", sep = ""),
    title_size = 14,
    label_size = 1.6,
    colour = c("#FF0000", "#006600", "#006600", "#00CC00", "#00FF00")
  )
    
  plots <- list(nuc_plate, cell_plate)

if (has_td_int && "tdTomato" %in% names(sub_df) && any(!is.na(sub_df$tdTomato))) {
  tdTomato_plate <- plate_plot(
    data = sub_df,
    position = Well_Num,
    value = tdTomato,
    plate_size = plateSize,
    title = paste(plate_List[plate], ", Avg. TdTomato Intensity/Condition:", sep = ""),
    title_size = 14,
    label_size = 1.6,
    colour = c("#FF0000", "#006600", "#006600", "#00CC00", "#00FF00")
  )
  plots <- c(plots, list(tdTomato_plate))
}

combined_plot <- do.call(grid.arrange, c(plots, ncol = 1))
    

  ggsave(filename = paste0(sub_dir, paste(plate_List[plate], "WTScreen_Figure.png")), plot = combined_plot, width = 8, height = 8)

}

```

```{r}
#For testing create backup
combined_Df_backup <- combined_Df
plate_Summary2_backup <- plate_Summary
# ORGANIZE AND EXPORT RANKED DATA
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
drop_all_na_cols <- function(df, cols) {
  cols_present <- intersect(cols, names(df))
  cols_drop <- cols_present[vapply(df[cols_present], function(x) all(is.na(x)), logical(1))]
  dplyr::select(df, -dplyr::any_of(cols_drop))
}

# ---- CONTROLS (optional tdTomato) ----
ctrl_cols <- c("Nuclei_Number", "Avg_Foci")
if (has_td_area) ctrl_cols <- c(ctrl_cols, "tdTomato_Area")
if (has_td_int)  ctrl_cols <- c(ctrl_cols, "tdTomato")

p_ctrls <- combined_Df %>%
  filter(Condition == pos_Ctrl) %>%
  group_by(plate_Num) %>%
  summarise(
    Control = pos_Ctrl,
    across(any_of(ctrl_cols), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

n_ctrls <- combined_Df %>%
  filter(Condition == neg_Ctrl) %>%
  group_by(plate_Num) %>%
  summarise(
    Control = neg_Ctrl,
    across(any_of(ctrl_cols), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ctrls <- bind_rows(p_ctrls, n_ctrls) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 2))) %>%
  rename(
    Plate     = plate_Num,
    CellCount = Nuclei_Number,
    AvgFoci   = Avg_Foci
  )

if ("tdTomato_Area" %in% names(ctrls)) ctrls <- ctrls %>% rename(TdTomato_Area = tdTomato_Area)
if ("tdTomato"      %in% names(ctrls)) ctrls <- ctrls %>% rename(TdTomatoIntensity = tdTomato)

# ---- PLATE SUMMARY: round + rename (robust) + optional drops ----
plate_Summary <- plate_Summary %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 2))) %>%
  rename(
    Plate                 = any_of("plate_Num"),
    STDPosCtrl            = any_of("mean_Pos_SD"),
    AvgFociPosCtrl        = any_of("mean_Pos_Foci"),
    CVPosCtrl             = any_of("cv_Pos"),
    Pos_TdTomatoArea      = any_of("tdTomato_Pos_Area"),
    Pos_TdTomatoIntensity = any_of("Nuclear_Pos_TdTomato"),
    STDNegCtrl            = any_of("mean_Neg_SD"),
    AvgFociNegCtrl        = any_of("mean_Neg_Foci"),
    CVNegCtrl             = any_of("cv_Neg"),
    Neg_TdTomatoArea      = any_of("tdTomato_Neg_Area"),
    Neg_TdTomatoIntensity = any_of("Nuclear_Neg_TdTomato"),
    PlateZScore           = any_of("ZPrime_Score"),
    SB                    = any_of("SB_Plate")
  )

# Your prior behavior: always remove area cols
plate_Summary <- plate_Summary %>% select(-any_of(c("Pos_TdTomatoArea", "Neg_TdTomatoArea")))

# If intensity wasn't present, remove those too
if (!has_td_int) {
  plate_Summary <- plate_Summary %>% select(-any_of(c("Pos_TdTomatoIntensity", "Neg_TdTomatoIntensity")))
}

# ---- FINAL RANKED OUTPUT (optional tdTomato) ----
combined_Df_out <- temp_stats_Df %>% filter(Condition == Well_Num)

base_off <- c("BZScore", "Viability", "plate_Num", "Well_Num", "ZPrime_Score",
              "PercentChange", "Avg_Foci", "CellCountDiff", "Nuclei_Number",
              "ZScore", "BScore", "AssayType")

base_on  <- c("ZScore", "Viability", "plate_Num", "Well_Num", "ZPrime_Score",
              "PercentChange", "Avg_Foci", "CellCountDiff", "Nuclei_Number",
              "AssayType")

td_cols <- character(0)
if (has_td_area) td_cols <- c(td_cols, "tdTomato_Area")
if (has_td_int)  td_cols <- c(td_cols, "tdTomato", "tdTomato_Diff")

if (assayType == "OFF") {
  keep_cols <- intersect(c(base_off, td_cols), names(combined_Df_out))

  combined_Df_out <- combined_Df_out %>%
    select(all_of(keep_cols)) %>%
    rename(
      Plate                = any_of("plate_Num"),
      Well                 = any_of("Well_Num"),
      PlateZPrimeScore     = any_of("ZPrime_Score"),
      PercentEffect        = any_of("PercentChange"),
      AvgFoci              = any_of("Avg_Foci"),
      CellCountPercentDiff = any_of("CellCountDiff"),
      CellCount            = any_of("Nuclei_Number")
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(BZScore)) %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 2)))

} else {
  keep_cols <- intersect(c(base_on, td_cols), names(combined_Df_out))

  combined_Df_out <- combined_Df_out %>%
    select(all_of(keep_cols)) %>%
    rename(
      Plate                = any_of("plate_Num"),
      Well                 = any_of("Well_Num"),
      PlateZPrimeScore     = any_of("ZPrime_Score"),
      PercentEffect        = any_of("PercentChange"),
      AvgFoci              = any_of("Avg_Foci"),
      CellCountPercentDiff = any_of("CellCountDiff"),
      CellCount            = any_of("Nuclei_Number")
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(ZScore)) %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 2)))
}



#Reorder:
if (assayType == "OFF") {
combined_Df_out <- combined_Df_out %>% arrange(desc(BZScore))
 } else {
combined_Df_out <- combined_Df_out %>% arrange(desc(ZScore))
 }  

if (assayType == "OFF"){
  hits_df <- combined_Df_out %>% filter(BZScore >= 3)
} else {
  hits_df <- combined_Df_out %>% filter(ZScore >= 3)
}

    

# ---- DROP tdTomato columns if they are entirely NA ----
td_cols_all <- c(
  "tdTomato_Area", "tdTomato", "tdTomato_Diff",
  "TdTomato_Area", "TdTomatoIntensity",
  "Pos_TdTomatoArea", "Neg_TdTomatoArea",
  "Pos_TdTomatoIntensity", "Neg_TdTomatoIntensity"
)

combined_Df_out <- drop_all_na_cols(combined_Df_out, td_cols_all)
ctrls           <- drop_all_na_cols(ctrls, td_cols_all)
plate_Summary   <- drop_all_na_cols(plate_Summary, td_cols_all)

# ---- EXPORT ----
export_File <- file.path(file_Location, "CondenScreenV2.xlsx")
wb <- createWorkbook()
addWorksheet(wb, "Combined Analysis")
addWorksheet(wb, "Hits")
addWorksheet(wb, "Plate Statistics")
addWorksheet(wb, "Controls")

# IMPORTANT FIX: write combined_Df_out (not combined_Df)
writeData(wb, "Combined Analysis", combined_Df_out, startCol = 1, startRow = 1, colNames = TRUE)

writeData(wb, sheet = "Hits", x = hits_df, startCol = 1,  startRow = 1, colNames = TRUE)

writeData(wb, "Plate Statistics", plate_Summary, startCol = 1, startRow = 1, colNames = TRUE)
writeData(wb, "Controls", ctrls, startCol = 1, startRow = 1, colNames = TRUE)
 
freezePane(wb, sheet = "Combined Analysis", firstActiveRow = 2)
freezePane(wb, sheet = "Hits", firstActiveRow = 2)
freezePane(wb, "Plate Statistics", firstActiveRow = 2)
freezePane(wb, "Controls", firstActiveRow = 2)

saveWorkbook(wb, file = export_File, overwrite = TRUE)
```


```{r}
# ------------- SETUP AND CONFIGURATION -------------
# Disable scientific notation for better readability
options(scipen = 999)

# ============================================================================
# CONDENSCREEN FIGURE GENERATION 
# ============================================================================

# ------------- DATA LOADING AND PREPARATION -------------
# Load workbook from predefined location (assuming save_Location is defined elsewhere)

wb <- loadWorkbook(export_File)

merged_df <- read.xlsx(wb, sheet = "Combined Analysis")

#Typically comment the following two lines out. Dataset Specific
#merged_df <- merged_df[merged_df$Plate != "A19946", ]
merged_df$Plate[merged_df$Plate == "READ"] <- "A19840"


# Convert numeric columns to proper type
merged_df$Average_foci_perCell <- as.numeric(merged_df$AvgFoci)
merged_df$Normalized_Effect <- as.numeric(merged_df$PercentEffect)
merged_df <- merged_df[!as.character(merged_df$Plate) %in% c("45", "46", "47"), ]
#EDIT: Change to location of a file linking compound/gene names to each well, if applicable, else comment out, and run the following 
#############################################################

template_location <- file.path(file_Location, "plateMap.xlsx")
template <- read.xlsx(template_location)

well_candidates <- c("Well", "Well_Condition")
ref_candidates  <- c("Reference", "Gene", "Compound")
cas_candidates  <- c("CAS", "CAS.Number")
smiles_candidates <- c("SMILES")

pick_first_existing <- function(df, candidates) {
  intersect(candidates, colnames(df))[1]
}

well_col   <- pick_first_existing(template, well_candidates)
ref_col    <- pick_first_existing(template, ref_candidates)
cas_col    <- pick_first_existing(template, cas_candidates)
smiles_col <- pick_first_existing(template, smiles_candidates)

select_cols <- c(
  intersect("Plate", colnames(template)),
  well_col,
  ref_col,
  cas_col,
  smiles_col
)

select_cols <- select_cols[!is.na(select_cols)]

template <- template %>%
  select(all_of(select_cols)) %>%
  rename(
    Well      = any_of(well_candidates),
    Reference = any_of(ref_candidates),
    CAS       = any_of(cas_candidates)
  )
# Merge data with compound names
 merged_df <- merge(merged_df, template, by = c("Plate", "Well"))

#############################################################
#If you do not have access to a file linking reference names to each well, uncomment and run below:

#merged_df$Reference <- merged_df$Well

#############################################################

#-------------------------CHANGE IF NECESSARY----------------------------
hits_of_interest <- c("PYRITHIONE ZINC", "CELASTROL", "PLUMBAGIN", "DISULFIRAM", "APOL3", "ZNF335", "RNF26", "RAN", "NUP
                       50", "EIF4A3", "TOR1A", "TOR1B")
microcephaly  <- c("ZNF335", "SIN3A", "SPDL1", "CDK5", "NCAPD3", "CIT", "SHH")
#------------------------------------------------------------------------

#############################################################

sheet_hits = "Hits"
sheet_df = "Combined Analysis"
merged_df <- merged_df[!is.na(merged_df$Reference), ]  # Keep only rows with reference names (compounds, genes, etc.)

# 1) Build hits_df2 (hits + QC columns)
hits_df <- if (assayType == "OFF") {
  merged_df %>% filter(BZScore >= 3)
} else {
  merged_df %>% filter(ZScore >= 3)
}

# (optional) make factors safe for Excel
hits_df <- hits_df %>% mutate(across(where(is.factor), as.character))
merged_df2 <- merged_df %>% mutate(across(where(is.factor), as.character))

# 2) Load the existing workbook and overwrite both sheets
wb <- loadWorkbook(export_File)

if (sheet_hits %in% names(wb)) removeWorksheet(wb, sheet_hits)
addWorksheet(wb, sheet_hits)
writeData(wb, sheet_hits, hits_df, startCol = 1, startRow = 1, colNames = TRUE)
freezePane(wb, sheet_hits, firstActiveRow = 2)
addFilter(wb, sheet_hits, rows = 1, cols = 1:ncol(hits_df))

if (sheet_df %in% names(wb)) removeWorksheet(wb, sheet_df)
addWorksheet(wb, sheet_df)
writeData(wb, sheet_df, merged_df2, startCol = 1, startRow = 1, colNames = TRUE)
freezePane(wb, sheet_df, firstActiveRow = 2)
addFilter(wb, sheet_df, rows = 1, cols = 1:ncol(merged_df2))

saveWorkbook(wb, export_File, overwrite = TRUE)
 
```

```{r}
#NORMALIZED SCORE PLOT:
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
score_col <- if ("BZScore" %in% names(merged_df)) "BZScore" else "ZScore"

merged_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(
    score_value = .data[[score_col]],

    bz_hit  = score_value >= 3,

    td_ok   = if (has_td_int && "tdTomato_Diff" %in% names(.))
                tdTomato_Diff >= -25
              else TRUE,

    viab_ok = if ("Viability" %in% names(.))
                Viability >= -25
              else TRUE
  ) %>%
  select(-score_value)

plot_normalized_score <- function(df, assay_type, image_path) {

  score_col <- if (assay_type == "OFF") sym("BZScore") else sym("ZScore")
  label_y   <- if (assay_type == "OFF") "BZ-Score" else "Z-Score"

  y_limits <- c(-4, 8)
  y_breaks <- c(-4, -2, 0, 2, 4, 6, 8)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = paste0(Well, Plate), y = !!score_col)) +

    # ---- background points (BZ < 3)
    geom_point(
      data = dplyr::filter(df, !!score_col < 3),
      color = "black",
      size = 1,
      alpha = 0.4,
      position = position_jitter(width = 0.3, height = 0)
    ) +

    # ---- BZ >= 3 hits, colored by phenotype logic
geom_point(
  data = dplyr::filter(df, !!score_col >= 3),
  aes(
    color = Reference %in% hits_of_interest,
    size  = Reference %in% hits_of_interest
  ),
  alpha = 1
) +
scale_size_manual(values  = c("TRUE" = 2.6, "FALSE" = 2)) +
guides(color = "none", size = "none") +
  scale_color_manual(
  values = c(
    "TRUE"  = "red",
    "FALSE" = "black"
    )
  ) +

  #Optional: Change color based on effect
    # scale_color_manual(
    #   values = c(
    #     green      = "green",
    #     red        = "red",
    #     purple     = "purple",
    #     background = "black"
    #   )
    # ) +

    geom_hline(yintercept = 2, linetype = "dashed", size = 1.5) +

    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x  = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold"),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold")

    ) +

    labs(
  x = "Compound",
  y = label_y
    )+
    scale_y_continuous(limits = y_limits, breaks = y_breaks) +
    guides(color = "none") +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = y_limits) +
    geom_text_repel(
  data = dplyr::filter(df, !!score_col >= 3),
  aes(label = Reference),
  size = 4.5,
  fontface = "bold",
  box.padding = 0.4,
  point.padding = 0.3,
  max.overlaps = Inf
)

  ggsave(
    filename = paste0(image_path, "normalized_SigScoreTdTomatoScreen.pdf"),
    plot = p,
    dpi = 300,
    width = 10,
    height = 10
  )

  return(p)
}


plot_normalized_score(merged_df, assayType ,image_Save_Location)

```

```{r}
#DISTRIBUTION PLOTS
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

#RAW DISTRIBUTION
# Create histogram of raw foci per cell
  raw_distribution <- ggplot(merged_df, aes(x = AvgFoci)) +
    geom_histogram(color = "black", fill = "darkgray", binwidth = 1) +
    geom_density(alpha = 0.6, fill = "darkgray") +
    labs(title = NULL, y = "Count", x = "MLF2-GFP Foci/Cell") +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(title = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold"),
          axis.title.x = element_text(size = 36, face = "bold"),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 30, face = "bold"),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 30, face = "bold"),
          axis.ticks.length = unit(0.4, "cm"),
          axis.ticks = element_line(size = 1.2))
  

ggsave(paste(image_Save_Location, "TdTomatoScreenrawdistrpilot.pdf", sep = ""), 
        raw_distribution, 
        dpi = 300, 
        width = 10, 
        height = 10)
  

#NORMALIZED EFFECT DISTRIBUTION
  normalized_dist <- ggplot(merged_df, aes(x = PercentEffect)) +
    geom_histogram(color = "black", fill = "darkgray", binwidth = 4 ) +
    geom_density(alpha = 0.6, fill = "darkgray") +
    # Add reference lines and labels
    geom_vline(aes(xintercept = 100), linetype = 'dashed', size = 2.5) +
    geom_vline(aes(xintercept = 0), linetype = 'dashed', size = 2.5) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(title = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold"),
          axis.title.x = element_text(size = 36, face = "bold"),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 30, face = "bold"),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 30, face = "bold"),
          axis.ticks.length = unit(0.4, "cm"),
          axis.ticks = element_line(size = 1.2))
  
  
#Normalized Distribution Plot:
if (assayType == "OFF") {
normalized_dist <- normalized_dist +
  annotate("text", x = 90, y = 110, label = pos_Ctrl, angle = 90, size = 16) +
  annotate("text", x = -15, y = 110, label = neg_Ctrl, color = "black", angle = 90, size = 16) +
  labs(title = NULL, y = "Count", x = "% Decrease in Foci")
 } else {
normalized_dist <- normalized_dist +
  annotate("text", x = 90, y = 1300, label = pos_Ctrl, angle = 90, size = 14) +
  annotate("text", x = -20, y = 1300, label = neg_Ctrl, color = "black", angle = 90, size = 14) +
  labs(title = NULL, y = "Count", x = "% Increase in Foci")
 } 
     
  # Save distribution plots
  ggsave(paste(image_Save_Location, "TdTomatoScreendistrpilot.pdf", sep = ""), 
        normalized_dist, 
        dpi = 300, 
        width = 10, 
        height = 10)
  

  
```





```{r}
###OPTIONAL###

# ============================================================
# HTS Spatial QC - Global Row/Col MEDIAN shifts + Heatmaps
# Refactored for improved readability and logical flow
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# 1. CONFIGURATION
# ============================================================
#If not previously defined:
fileX   <- "/Users/dylan/Documents/Bioinformatics/condenscreen/Condenscreen-v1.2/DownloadCondenScreen/CondenScreenV2.xlsx"

export_File <- fileX
sheetX  <- "Combined Analysis"
out_dir <- paste0(file_Location, "HTS_QC_OUT/")
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

hit_threshold <- 2
alpha_qc <- 0.05

# ============================================================
# 2. HELPER FUNCTIONS
# ============================================================

# --- Plotting utilities ---
save_plot <- function(p, fname, w=12, h=6) {
  ggsave(file.path(out_dir, fname), plot = p, width=w, height=h, dpi=300)
}

theme_prismish <- function(base_size = 12) {
  theme_classic(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      plot.title  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),

      axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
      axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),

      axis.text.x  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      axis.text.y  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),

      panel.grid = element_blank()
    )
}


bar_shift <- function(df_sum, xcol, ycol, title, xlab, ylab,
                      rotate_x = FALSE, ylim = NULL) {

  p <- ggplot(df_sum, aes(x = .data[[xcol]], y = .data[[ycol]])) +
    geom_col(fill = "#2E1A47", color = "black", linewidth = 0.25, width = 0.9) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.4) +
    labs(title = title, x = xlab, y = ylab) +
    theme_prismish()

  if (!is.null(ylim)) p <- p + coord_cartesian(ylim = ylim)
  if (rotate_x) p <- p + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1))
  p
}


heatmap_metric <- function(df_grid, fill_col, title, fill_lab) {
  ggplot(df_grid, aes(x = factor(col2), y = row, fill = .data[[fill_col]])) +
    geom_tile(color = NA) +
    labs(title = title, x = "Column", y = "Row", fill = fill_lab) +
    theme_prismish() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, vjust=0.5),
          legend.position = "right") +
    scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "viridis", na.value = "grey90") +
    guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title.position = "top", barwidth = unit(0.5, "cm"), barheight = unit(6, "cm")))
}

save_bar_fig_constant_barwidth <- function(p, fname, n_bars,
                                           inches_per_bar = 0.55,
                                           base_inches = 4,
                                           h = 9,
                                           min_w = 10,
                                           max_w = 20) {
  w <- base_inches + inches_per_bar * n_bars
  w <- max(min_w, min(max_w, w))
  ggsave(file.path(out_dir, fname), plot = p, width = w, height = h, dpi = 300)
}


# --- Data parsing ---
parse_well <- function(df) {
  df %>% mutate(
    row = str_sub(Well, 1, 1),
    col = as.integer(str_remove(Well, "^[A-Za-z]")),
    col2 = sprintf("%02d", col),
    well_pos = paste0(row, col2)
  )
}

# --- Statistical testing functions ---
mw_test <- function(df, group_var, value_col) {
  group_levels <- levels(df[[group_var]])
  
  bind_rows(lapply(group_levels, function(g) {
    in_group <- df[[group_var]] == g
    x1 <- df[[value_col]][in_group]
    x2 <- df[[value_col]][!in_group]

    if (length(na.omit(x1)) < 3 || length(na.omit(x2)) < 3) {
      result <- setNames(list(g, NA_real_, NA_real_), c(group_var, "statistic", "p_value"))
    } else {
      wt <- wilcox.test(x1, x2, alternative = "two.sided", exact = FALSE)
      result <- setNames(list(g, as.numeric(wt$statistic), as.numeric(wt$p.value)), 
                        c(group_var, "statistic", "p_value"))
    }
    
    result <- as_tibble(result)
    
    if (group_var == "well_pos") {
      result <- result %>% mutate(
        n_in = sum(in_group),
        n_out = sum(!in_group),
        med_in = median(x1, na.rm = TRUE),
        med_out = median(x2, na.rm = TRUE)
      )
    }
    result
  })) %>%
    mutate(p_fdr = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
    arrange(p_value)
}

fisher_test <- function(df, group_var, hit_col = "Hit") {
  group_levels <- if (is.factor(df[[group_var]])) {
    levels(df[[group_var]])
  } else {
    sort(unique(df[[group_var]]))
  }
  
  bind_rows(lapply(group_levels, function(g) {
    in_group <- df[[group_var]] == g
    
    tab <- matrix(c(
      sum(df[[hit_col]][in_group] == 1, na.rm=TRUE),
      sum(df[[hit_col]][in_group] == 0, na.rm=TRUE),
      sum(df[[hit_col]][!in_group] == 1, na.rm=TRUE),
      sum(df[[hit_col]][!in_group] == 0, na.rm=TRUE)
    ), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE)

    ft <- fisher.test(tab, alternative = "greater")
    
    result <- setNames(list(g, as.numeric(ft$p.value)), c(group_var, "p_value"))
    result <- as_tibble(result)
    
    if (group_var == "well_pos") {
      result <- result %>% mutate(
        n_in = sum(in_group),
        hit_in = tab[1,1],
        hit_out = tab[2,1]
      )
    } else if (group_var == "Plate") {
      result <- result %>% mutate(
        n_plate = sum(in_group),
        hits_plate = tab[1,1],
        hits_other = tab[2,1]
      )
    }
    result
  })) %>%
    mutate(p_fdr = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
    arrange(p_value)
}

plot_plate_hits <- function(df, hit_col = "Hit", sig_plates = character(0), 
                            title = "Hits: global plate totals") {
  plate_sum <- df %>%
    group_by(Plate) %>%
    summarize(hit_sum = sum(.data[[hit_col]] == 1, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(sig = Plate %in% sig_plates)

  ggplot(plate_sum, aes(x = factor(Plate), y = hit_sum)) +
    geom_col(fill = "#2E1A47", color = "black", linewidth = 0.25, width = 0.9) +
    geom_text(aes(label = hit_sum), vjust = -0.35, size = 3) +
    geom_text(data = subset(plate_sum, sig), aes(label="*"), vjust = -1.2, size = 6) +
    labs(title = title, x = "Plate", y = "Total hits") +
    theme_prismish() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1))
}

# ============================================================
# 3. DATA LOADING & PREPARATION
# ============================================================
df <- read.xlsx(fileX, sheet = sheetX) %>%
  parse_well()

# make BZScore optional: if missing, create as NA_real_
# Ensure BZScore exists (optional column)
if (!("BZScore" %in% colnames(df))) {
  df$BZScore <- NA_real_
}

has_bz <- any(!is.na(df$BZScore))

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Hit = if ("Hit" %in% colnames(.)) {
      as.integer(Hit)
    } else if (has_bz) {
      as.integer(BZScore >= hit_threshold)
    } else {
      as.integer(ZScore >= hit_threshold)
    },
    Hit = Hit
  )

score_metric <- if ("Hit" %in% colnames(df)) {
  "Hit (precomputed)"
} else if (has_bz) {
  "BZScore"
} else {
  "ZScore"
}

# Factor ordering
row_levels <- sort(unique(df$row))
col_levels <- sprintf("%02d", sort(unique(as.integer(df$col2))))
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    row = factor(row, levels = row_levels),
    col2 = factor(col2, levels = col_levels),
    well_pos = factor(well_pos)
  )
# ============================================================
# 4. GLOBAL SUMMARY STATISTICS
# ============================================================

# Row summaries
row_z  <- df %>% group_by(row) %>% summarize(med_z = median(ZScore, na.rm=TRUE), .groups="drop")
row_bz <- df %>% group_by(row) %>% summarize(med_bz = median(BZScore, na.rm=TRUE), .groups="drop")
row_h  <- df %>% group_by(row) %>% summarize(hit_sum = sum(Hit, na.rm=TRUE), .groups="drop")

# Column summaries
col_z  <- df %>% group_by(col2) %>% summarize(med_z = median(ZScore, na.rm=TRUE), .groups="drop")
col_bz <- df %>% group_by(col2) %>% summarize(med_bz = median(BZScore, na.rm=TRUE), .groups="drop")
col_h  <- df %>% group_by(col2) %>% summarize(hit_sum = sum(Hit, na.rm=TRUE), .groups="drop")

# Well position grid
grid_sum <- df %>%
  group_by(row, col2) %>%
  summarize(
    med_z = median(ZScore, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_bz = median(BZScore, na.rm=TRUE),
    hit_sum = sum(Hit, na.rm=TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Per-plate summaries
plate_row_stats <- df %>%
  group_by(Plate, row) %>%
  summarize(n = n(), med_z = median(ZScore, na.rm=TRUE), 
            med_bz = median(BZScore, na.rm=TRUE), hit_sum = sum(Hit, na.rm=TRUE), .groups="drop")

plate_col_stats <- df %>%
  group_by(Plate, col2) %>%
  summarize(n = n(), med_z = median(ZScore, na.rm=TRUE), 
            med_bz = median(BZScore, na.rm=TRUE), hit_sum = sum(Hit, na.rm=TRUE), .groups="drop")

# ============================================================
# 5. STATISTICAL TESTS
# ============================================================

# Tests on score metrics
test_row_z  <- mw_test(df, "row", "ZScore")
test_col_z  <- mw_test(df, "col2", "ZScore")
test_well_z <- mw_test(df, "well_pos", "ZScore")

if (has_bz) {
  test_row_bz  <- mw_test(df, "row", "BZScore")
  test_col_bz  <- mw_test(df, "col2", "BZScore")
  test_well_bz <- mw_test(df, "well_pos", "BZScore")
}

# Tests on hit enrichment
test_row_hit  <- fisher_test(df, "row")
test_col_hit  <- fisher_test(df, "col2")
test_well_hit <- fisher_test(df, "well_pos")
test_plate_Hit <- fisher_test(df, "Plate")

# Extract significant groups
sig_rows_score <- if (has_bz) {
  test_row_bz %>% filter(!is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr < alpha_qc) %>% pull(row) %>% as.character()
} else {
  test_row_z %>% filter(!is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr < alpha_qc) %>% pull(row) %>% as.character()
}

sig_cols_score <- if (has_bz) {
  test_col_bz %>% filter(!is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr < alpha_qc) %>% pull(col2) %>% as.character()
} else {
  test_col_z %>% filter(!is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr < alpha_qc) %>% pull(col2) %>% as.character()
}

sig_wp_score <- if (has_bz) {
  test_well_bz %>% filter(!is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr < alpha_qc) %>% pull(well_pos) %>% as.character()
} else {
  test_well_z %>% filter(!is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr < alpha_qc) %>% pull(well_pos) %>% as.character()
}

sig_rows_hit   <- test_row_hit %>% filter(!is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr < alpha_qc) %>% pull(row) %>% as.character()
sig_cols_hit   <- test_col_hit %>% filter(!is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr < alpha_qc) %>% pull(col2) %>% as.character()
sig_wp_hit     <- test_well_hit %>% filter(!is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr < alpha_qc) %>% pull(well_pos) %>% as.character()
sig_plates_hit <- test_plate_Hit %>% filter(!is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr < alpha_qc) %>% pull(Plate) %>% as.character()

# ============================================================
# 6. VISUALIZATION
# ============================================================

# Shared y-axis limits
row_lim <- max(abs(c(row_z$med_z, row_bz$med_bz)), na.rm=TRUE)
col_lim <- max(abs(c(col_z$med_z, col_bz$med_bz)), na.rm=TRUE)
row_lim <- ifelse(is.finite(row_lim) && row_lim > 0, row_lim, 1)
col_lim <- ifelse(is.finite(col_lim) && col_lim > 0, col_lim, 1)
ylim_row <- c(-row_lim, row_lim)
ylim_col <- c(-col_lim, col_lim)



# Row plots
p_row_z <- bar_shift(row_z, "row", "med_z", "ZScore: global row shift (median)", 
                     "Row", "Median ZScore", ylim = ylim_row)
p_row_h <- bar_shift(row_h, "row", "hit_sum", "Hits: global row totals", "Row", "Total hits")

if (has_bz) {
  p_row_bz <- bar_shift(row_bz, "row", "med_bz", "BZScore: global row shift (median)", 
                        "Row", "Median BZScore", ylim = ylim_row)
}


# Column plots 
p_col_z <- bar_shift(col_z, "col2", "med_z", "ZScore: global col shift (median)", 
                     "Column", "Median ZScore", rotate_x = TRUE, ylim = ylim_col)
p_col_h <- bar_shift(col_h, "col2", "hit_sum", "Hits: global col totals", 
                     "Column", "Total hits", rotate_x = TRUE)

if (has_bz) {
  p_col_bz <- bar_shift(col_bz, "col2", "med_bz", "BZScore: global col shift (median)", 
                        "Column", "Median BZScore", rotate_x = TRUE, ylim = ylim_col)
}

# Heatmaps
p_heat_z <- heatmap_metric(grid_sum, "med_z", "Heatmap: median ZScore by well position", "Median ZScore")
p_heat_hit <- heatmap_metric(grid_sum, "hit_sum", "Heatmap: total hits by well position", "Total hits")

if (has_bz) {
  p_heat_bz <- heatmap_metric(grid_sum, "med_bz", "Heatmap: median BZScore by well position", "Median BZScore")
}

# Plate hits
p_plate_h <- plot_plate_hits(df, hit_col = "Hit", sig_plates = sig_plates_hit,
                             title = "Hits: global plate totals (significant plates marked *)")


heatmap_theme_clean <- theme(
  plot.title = element_text(
    size = 16,
    face = "bold",
    hjust = 0
  ),
  axis.title = element_text(
    size = 14,
    face = "bold"
  ),
  axis.text.x = element_text(
    size = 12,
    face = "bold"
  ),
  axis.text.y = element_text(
    size = 12,
    face = "bold"
  ),
  legend.title = element_text(
    size = 14,
    face = "bold"
  ),
  legend.text = element_text(
    size = 12,
    face = "bold"
  )
)
paper_div_impact_clean <- function(lims = c(-2, 2), midpoint = 0) {

  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colours = c(
      "#E00000",   # strong negative (clean red)
      "#FF7A00",   # mild negative (orange)
      "#FFFFFF",   # zero (pure white)
      "#5A0AA4",   # mild positive (magenta)
      "#1A0033"    # strong positive (deep purple)
    ),  
    values = scales::rescale(
      c(
        lims[1],
        lims[1] + (midpoint - lims[1]) * 0.5,
        midpoint,
        midpoint + (lims[2] - midpoint) * 0.5,
        lims[2]
      ),
      from = lims
    ),
    limits = lims,
    oob    = scales::squish
  )
}

# Apply to heatmaps
p_heat_z  <- p_heat_z  + paper_div_impact_clean(lims = c(-2, 2))

if (has_bz) {
  p_heat_bz <- p_heat_bz + paper_div_impact_clean(lims = c(-2, 2))
}
 
# 2) Hits map: force ALL non-hits to gray; only hits get color (discrete)
#    (This requires the hits heatmap to use fill = Hits_bin, shown below.)
# ---- Hits scale: gray background, colored hits, AND a visible legend ----
# Make the legend show 0..max_hits, where max_hits = max hits per well (capped if you want)
 
# ---- Apply: set max to max(hits) per well (or cap, if you prefer) ----
# ---- max hits per well for the legend ----
# Continuous hits scale: 0 = modern gray; >0 ramps orange -> magenta -> near-black purple
hit_impact_purple_deeper <- function(max_hits, zero_color = "#F5F5F5") {

  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colours = c(
      zero_color,   # 0
      "#B8AEC9",    # very light neutral violet (less pink)
      "#5A3E86",    # balanced muted purple
      "#4A3A73",    # deep plum
      "#1A0033"     # endpoint (matches Z/BZ max)
    ),
    values = scales::rescale(
      c(0,
        max_hits * 0.3,
        max_hits * 0.55,
        max_hits * 0.8,
        max_hits),
      from = c(0, max_hits)
    ),
    limits = c(0, max_hits),
    oob    = scales::squish,
    guide  = guide_colorbar(
      title     = "Hits per well",
      barheight = unit(5, "cm")
    )
  )
}
max_hits_well <- max(grid_sum$hit_sum, na.rm = TRUE)

p_heat_hit <- heatmap_metric(
  grid_sum, "hit_sum",
  "Heatmap: total hits by well position",
  "Total hits"
) +
  hit_impact_purple_deeper(max_hits = max_hits_well) +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

p_heat_z <- p_heat_z +
  labs(
    title = "Heatmap: Median Z-Score by Well Position",
    fill  = "Median Z-Score"
  ) +
  heatmap_theme_clean

if (has_bz) {
  p_heat_bz <- p_heat_bz +
    labs(
      title = "Heatmap: Median BZ-Score by Well Position",
      fill  = "Median BZ-Score"
    ) +
    heatmap_theme_clean
}


p_heat_hit <- p_heat_hit +
  labs(title = "Heatmap: Total Hits by Well Position") +
  heatmap_theme_clean

# =========================
row_fig <- if (has_bz) {
  (p_row_z / p_row_bz / p_row_h) + plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1, 1)) + plot_annotation(title = "Global Row QC")
} else {
  (p_row_z / p_row_h) + plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1)) + plot_annotation(title = "Global Row QC")
}

col_fig <- if (has_bz) {
  (p_col_z / p_col_bz / p_col_h) + plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1, 1)) + plot_annotation(title = "Global Column QC")
} else {
  (p_col_z / p_col_h) + plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1)) + plot_annotation(title = "Global Column QC")
}

heat_fig <- if (has_bz) {
  (p_heat_z / p_heat_bz / p_heat_hit) + plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1, 1)) 
} else {
  (p_heat_z / p_heat_hit) + plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1)) 
}
  
n_row <- dplyr::n_distinct(df$row)   # or row_z$row
n_col <- dplyr::n_distinct(df$col2)  # or col_z$col2

h_rc <- if (has_bz) 12 else 9

save_bar_fig_constant_barwidth(row_fig, "QC_ROWS_combined.png", n_bars = n_row, h = h_rc)
save_bar_fig_constant_barwidth(col_fig, "QC_COLS_combined.png", n_bars = n_col, h = h_rc)

# heatmaps can stay fixed

# Save plots
save_plot(row_fig,  "QC_ROWS_combined.png",  w = 14, h = if (has_bz) 12 else 9)
save_plot(col_fig,  "QC_COLS_combined.png",  w = 14, h = if (has_bz) 12 else 9)
save_plot(heat_fig, "QC_HEAT_combined.png",  w = 12, h = if (has_bz) 12 else 9)
save_plot(p_plate_h, "QC_PLATES_hits.png", w = 14, h = 7)

# ============================================================
# 7. QC ANNOTATION FOR HITS
# ============================================================

type_string <- function(pl, r, c, wp) {
  out <- character(0)

  if (!is.na(r) && as.character(r) %in% sig_rows_hit)   out <- c(out, "Row enrichment [Hit]")
  if (!is.na(r) && as.character(r) %in% sig_rows_score) out <- c(out, paste0("Row shift [", score_metric, "]"))
  if (!is.na(c) && as.character(c) %in% sig_cols_hit)   out <- c(out, "Col enrichment [Hit]")
  if (!is.na(c) && as.character(c) %in% sig_cols_score) out <- c(out, paste0("Col shift [", score_metric, "]"))
  if (!is.na(wp) && as.character(wp) %in% sig_wp_hit)   out <- c(out, "Well position enrichment [Hit]")
  if (!is.na(wp) && as.character(wp) %in% sig_wp_score) out <- c(out, paste0("Well position shift [", score_metric, "]"))
  if (!is.na(pl) && as.character(pl) %in% sig_plates_hit) out <- c(out, "Plate enrichment [Hit]")

  if (length(out) == 0) return("None")
  paste(unique(out), collapse = "; ")
}

hits_df_qc <- df %>%
  filter(Hit == 1) %>%
  mutate(
    Type_of_Error = purrr::pmap_chr(list(Plate, row, col2, well_pos), type_string),
    Systematic_error = ifelse(Type_of_Error == "None", "No", "Yes"),
    QC_alpha = alpha_qc
  ) %>%
  select(everything(), Systematic_error, Type_of_Error, QC_alpha) %>%
  select(-any_of(c("Hit", "Hit", "QC_row_score", "QC_col_score", "QC_well_score",
                   "QC_row_hit", "QC_col_hit", "QC_well_hit", "QC_score_flag", "QC_hit_flag",
                   "Systematic_plate_error", "Systematic_error_type", "QC_score_metric_used")))

# ============================================================
# 8. EXPORT RESULTS
# ============================================================

# Add Hits_QC sheet to original workbook
orig_wb <- loadWorkbook(fileX)
hits_sheet_name <- "Hits_QC"
if (hits_sheet_name %in% names(orig_wb)) removeWorksheet(orig_wb, hits_sheet_name)

addWorksheet(orig_wb, hits_sheet_name)
hits_out <- hits_df_qc %>% mutate(across(where(is.factor), as.character))
writeData(orig_wb, hits_sheet_name, hits_out)
freezePane(orig_wb, hits_sheet_name, firstRow = TRUE)
addFilter(orig_wb, hits_sheet_name, rows = 1, cols = 1:ncol(hits_out))
saveWorkbook(orig_wb, fileX, overwrite = TRUE)

# Create comprehensive QC report workbook
wb <- createWorkbook()
write_df <- function(sheet_name, x) {
  addWorksheet(wb, sheet_name)
  writeData(wb, sheet_name, x)
}

write_df("HITS_with_QC_flags", hits_df_qc)
write_df("TEST_plate_HitPref_vs_rest", test_plate_Hit)
write_df("TEST_row_Z_vs_rest", test_row_z)
write_df("TEST_col_Z_vs_rest", test_col_z)
write_df("TEST_wellpos_Z_vs_rest", test_well_z)

if (has_bz) {
  write_df("TEST_row_BZ_vs_rest", test_row_bz)
  write_df("TEST_col_BZ_vs_rest", test_col_bz)
  write_df("TEST_wellpos_BZ_vs_rest", test_well_bz)
}

write_df("TEST_row_Hit_vs_rest", test_row_hit)
write_df("TEST_col_Hit_vs_rest", test_col_hit)
write_df("TEST_wellpos_Hit_vs_rest", test_well_hit)
write_df("global_row_medians", left_join(row_z, row_bz, by="row") %>% left_join(row_h, by="row"))
write_df("global_col_medians", left_join(col_z, col_bz, by="col2") %>% left_join(col_h, by="col2"))
write_df("global_grid", grid_sum)
write_df("plate_row_stats", plate_row_stats)
write_df("plate_col_stats", plate_col_stats)



saveWorkbook(wb, file.path(out_dir, "HTS_QC_RESULTS.xlsx"), overwrite = TRUE)

invisible(NULL)




#Overwrite previous hits sheet in original workbook to add QC measures:

sheet_hits <- "Hits"

# 1) Build hits_df2 (hits + QC columns)
hits_df <- if (assayType == "OFF") {
  merged_df %>% filter(BZScore >= 3)
} else {
  merged_df %>% filter(ZScore >= 3)
}

hits_df2 <- hits_df %>%
  left_join(
    hits_df_qc %>% select(Plate, Well, Systematic_error, QC_alpha),
    by = c("Plate", "Well")
  )

# (optional) make factors safe for Excel
hits_df2 <- hits_df2 %>% mutate(across(where(is.factor), as.character))

# 2) Load the existing workbook and overwrite the Hits sheet
wb <- loadWorkbook(fileX)

if (sheet_hits %in% names(wb)) removeWorksheet(wb, sheet_hits)
addWorksheet(wb, sheet_hits)

writeData(wb, sheet_hits, hits_df2, startCol = 1, startRow = 1, colNames = TRUE)
freezePane(wb, sheet_hits, firstActiveRow = 2)
addFilter(wb, sheet_hits, rows = 1, cols = 1:ncol(hits_df2))

saveWorkbook(wb, fileX, overwrite = TRUE)
```



```{r}
###OPTIONAL###
# ============================================================
# Configuration
# ============================================================
#Path to previously exported datasheet.
#save_Location <- "/Users/dylan/Downloads/pharmakon 2/"

#If not previously defined:
fileX   <- "/Users/dylan/Documents/Bioinformatics/condenscreen/Condenscreen-v1.2/DownloadCondenScreen/CondenScreenV2.xlsx"

#Saves cached smiles, if available, to avoid re-querying PubChem/CACTUS
CACHE_PATH <- paste0(save_Location, "smiles_cache.tsv")
# ============================================================
# 1) Load and merge data
#Note: the drug/gene/identifier must be name Reference (it automatically will be unless changed)
df_merged <-  read.xlsx(fileX, sheet = "Hits") %>%
  mutate(Reference = trimws(as.character(Reference)))

#Determines if reference already has SMILES chemical string available
has_smiles <- "SMILES" %in% colnames(df_merged) &&
              any(nzchar(trimws(df_merged$SMILES)), na.rm = TRUE)

df_merged <- df_merged %>%
  mutate(
    CAS    = if ("CAS" %in% colnames(.)) as.character(CAS) else NA_character_,
    SMILES = if ("SMILES" %in% colnames(.)) as.character(SMILES) else NA_character_
  )

# ============================================================
# 2) Cache management
# ============================================================
smiles_cache <- new.env(parent = emptyenv())

if (file.exists(CACHE_PATH)) {
  cache_df <- readr::read_tsv(CACHE_PATH, show_col_types = FALSE)
  if (nrow(cache_df) > 0) {
    purrr::walk2(cache_df$key, cache_df$value,
                 ~ assign(.x, .y, envir = smiles_cache))
  }
}

cache_get <- function(key) {
  if (exists(key, envir = smiles_cache, inherits = FALSE)) 
    get(key, envir = smiles_cache) 
  else NULL
}

cache_set <- function(key, value) assign(key, value, envir = smiles_cache)

cache_flush <- function() {
  keys <- ls(smiles_cache, all.names = TRUE)
  if (length(keys) > 0) {
    tibble::tibble(
      key = keys,
      value = vapply(keys, function(k) get(k, envir = smiles_cache), character(1))
    ) %>% readr::write_tsv(CACHE_PATH)
  }
}

#Activate the RDKit Python environment
use_condaenv("rdkit-env", required = TRUE)
Chem    <- import("rdkit.Chem")
RDLogger <- import("rdkit.RDLogger")
RDLogger$DisableLog("rdApp.*")

# ============================================================
# 3) Identifier cleaning and SMILES retrieval
# ============================================================

#clean_cas -- experimental: Will try to increase the chance PubChem/CACTUS recognizes your CAS. May need adjustment on case-by-case basis
clean_cas <- function(x) {
  
  if (is.na(x) || !nzchar(trimws(x))) return(NA_character_)
  x <- trimws(gsub("\\[.*?\\]", "", as.character(x)))
  parts <- trimws(unlist(strsplit(x, "[,;]")))
  parts <- parts[nzchar(parts)]
  if (length(parts) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  
  is_cas <- grepl("^\\d{2,7}-\\d{2}-\\d$", parts)
  if (any(is_cas)) parts[which(is_cas)[1]] else parts[1]
}


#clean SMILES:
normalize_key <- function(x) {
  if (is.na(x)) return(NA_character_)
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- gsub("[\t\r\n]", " ", x)
  x <- trimws(x)
  tolower(x)
}

sanitize_smiles <- function(smi) {
  if (is.na(smi) || !nzchar(trimws(smi))) return(NA_character_)
  smi <- trimws(smi)
  smi <- gsub("[\t\r\n ]+", "", smi)
  smi <- gsub("\\|", ".", smi)
  smi
}

#Try parse SMILES into an RDKit molecule, else NULL
safe_mol <- function(smi) {
  if (is.na(smi) || !nzchar(trimws(smi))) return(NULL)
  tryCatch(Chem$MolFromSmiles(trimws(smi)), error = function(e) NULL)
}

is_valid_smiles <- function(smi) {
  mol <- safe_mol(smi)
  !is.null(mol)
}



#Returning SMILES:
#--------
#Will try to parse PubChem first for SMILES...
pubchem_smiles <- function(id, namespace = c("name", "rn"), timeout_s = 20) {
  namespace <- match.arg(namespace)
  if (is.na(id) || !nzchar(trimws(id))) return(NA_character_)
  
  url <- sprintf(
    "https://pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/rest/pug/compound/%s/%s/property/IsomericSMILES,CanonicalSMILES/JSON",
    namespace, URLencode(id, reserved = TRUE)
  )
  
  resp <- tryCatch(request(url) |> req_timeout(timeout_s) |> req_perform(), 
                   error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(resp) || resp_status(resp) >= 400) return(NA_character_)
  
  j <- tryCatch(fromJSON(resp_body_string(resp)), error = function(e) NULL)
  props <- j$PropertyTable$Properties
  if (is.null(props) || nrow(props) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  
  smi <- props$IsomericSMILES[1]
  if (is.null(smi) || is.na(smi) || !nzchar(smi)) smi <- props$CanonicalSMILES[1]
  if (is.null(smi) || is.na(smi) || !nzchar(smi)) NA_character_ else smi
}


#... but if fails will resort to CACTUS, NCI Chemical Identifier Resolver: https://cactus.nci.nih.gov/chemical/structure
cactus_smiles <- function(id, timeout_s = 20) {
  if (is.na(id) || !nzchar(trimws(id))) return(NA_character_)

  url <- sprintf("https://cactus.nci.nih.gov/chemical/structure/%s/smiles",
                 URLencode(id, reserved = TRUE))

  for (k in 1:3) {
    resp <- tryCatch(request(url) |> req_timeout(timeout_s) |> req_perform(),
                     error = function(e) NULL)
    if (!is.null(resp) && resp_status(resp) < 400) {
      smi <- sanitize_smiles(resp_body_string(resp))
      if (!is.na(smi) && !grepl("not found", smi, ignore.case = TRUE) && is_valid_smiles(smi)) {
        return(smi)
      }
    }
    Sys.sleep(0.5 * k)
  }
  NA_character_
}

get_smiles <- function(cas, name) {
  cas1  <- clean_cas(cas)
  name1 <- if (is.na(name) || !nzchar(trimws(name))) NA_character_ else trimws(name)

  # normalized cache keys
  key_rn <- if (!is.na(cas1)) paste0("RN:", normalize_key(cas1)) else NULL
  key_nm <- if (!is.na(name1)) paste0("NM:", normalize_key(name1)) else NULL

  # ---- cache check (use normalized keys only)
  for (key in c(key_rn, key_nm)) {
    if (!is.null(key)) {
      cached <- cache_get(key)
      if (!is.null(cached) && !identical(cached, "NA") && nzchar(cached)) {
        # sanitize/validate cached (in case old bad entries exist)
        cached2 <- sanitize_smiles(cached)
        if (!is.na(cached2) && is_valid_smiles(cached2)) return(cached2)
      }
      if (!is.null(cached) && identical(cached, "NA")) return(NA_character_)
    }
  }

  # ---- retrieval
  smi <- NA_character_
  if (!is.na(cas1)) smi <- pubchem_smiles(cas1, "rn")
  if (is.na(smi) && !is.na(name1)) smi <- pubchem_smiles(name1, "name")
  if (is.na(smi) && !is.na(cas1)) smi <- cactus_smiles(cas1)
  if (is.na(smi) && !is.na(name1)) smi <- cactus_smiles(name1)

  # ---- sanitize + validate
  smi <- sanitize_smiles(smi)
  if (!is.na(smi) && !is_valid_smiles(smi)) smi <- NA_character_

  # ---- cache (normalized keys only)
  if (!is.null(key_rn)) cache_set(key_rn, ifelse(is.na(smi), "NA", smi))
  if (!is.null(key_nm)) cache_set(key_nm, ifelse(is.na(smi), "NA", smi))

  smi
}
 
#--------

# Retrieve SMILES for all compounds
#Remove whitespace and replace with NA
df_hits <- df_merged %>%
  mutate(
    Reference = if_else(
      is.na(Reference) | trimws(Reference) == "",
      NA_character_,
      as.character(Reference)
    )
  )

# Identify rows that actually need lookup 
need_lookup <- with(
  df_hits,
  (is.na(SMILES) | !nzchar(trimws(SMILES))) &
  !(is.na(CAS) & is.na(Reference))
)

n_lookup <- sum(need_lookup)

if (n_lookup > 0) {

  idx <- which(need_lookup)

  message("Retrieving SMILES for ", n_lookup, " compounds")

  pb <- progress::progress_bar$new(
    format = "Compound :current/:total [:bar] :percent | eta: :eta",
    total  = length(idx),
    clear  = FALSE,
    width  = 60
  )

  df_hits$SMILES[idx] <- vapply(
    idx,
    function(i) {
      pb$tick()
      get_smiles(df_hits$CAS[i], df_hits$Reference[i])
    },
    character(1)
  )

  cache_flush()

} else {
  message("All compounds already have SMILES — no lookup performed")
}

#Diagnostic to determine how well CAS/SMILES search worked
sum(is.na(df_hits$CAS) & is.na(df_hits$Reference))


# ============================================================
# 4) RDKit setup and molecular processing
# ============================================================

#Import modules for describing molecular descriptors (e.g., molc. weight), cLogP, Lipinski counts, and safeguard measures.
Desc <- import("rdkit.Chem.Descriptors")
Crip <- import("rdkit.Chem.Crippen")
Lip <- import("rdkit.Chem.Lipinski")
rdMS <- import("rdkit.Chem.MolStandardize.rdMolStandardize")
uncharger <- rdMS$Uncharger()
largest_frag <- rdMS$LargestFragmentChooser()



#Try to edit SMILES format to reflect canonical SMILES [avoids salt charges, keeps largest fragment, etc.]
canonicalize_parent <- function(smiles) {
  if (is.na(smiles) || !nzchar(trimws(smiles))) return(NA_character_)
  
  mol <- safe_mol(smiles)
  if (is.null(mol)) return(NA_character_)
  
  mol <- tryCatch(uncharger$uncharge(mol), error = function(e) mol)
  mol <- tryCatch(largest_frag$choose(mol), error = function(e) mol)
  
  tryCatch(Chem$MolToSmiles(mol, canonical = TRUE, kekuleSmiles = FALSE),
           error = function(e) NA_character_)
}

# Process SMILES for property calculations
df_hits <- df_hits %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  mutate(
    SMILES_used = ifelse(
      is.na(SMILES) | SMILES == "",
      NA_character_,
      vapply(as.character(SMILES), canonicalize_parent, character(1))
    )
  )
# ============================================================
# 5) Load structural alerts
# ============================================================

#All credit for the initial chemical alerts goes to Pat Walters.
#See Pat Walter's GitHub, rd_fitlers, for more information: https://github.com/PatWalters/rd_filters.git
#The csv file can alternatively be downloaded directly with the rest of the CondenScreen code in https://github.com/SchliekerLab/Condenscreen-v1.1.git




get_alerts <- function(cache_dir = "nuisance_cache",
                       local_file = "alert_collection_PatWalters.csv") {
  dir.create(cache_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  f_cache <- file.path(cache_dir, "alert_collection.csv")
  url <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PatWalters/rd_filters/master/rd_filters/data/alert_collection.csv"

  # ---- Prefer local file, then cached file, else download ----
  if (file.exists(local_file)) {
    message("Using local alert file: ", local_file)
    al <- read.csv(local_file, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  } else if (file.exists(f_cache)) {
    message("Using cached alert file: ", f_cache)
    al <- read.csv(f_cache, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  } else {
    message("Downloading alert collection from GitHub...")
    download.file(url, f_cache, mode = "wb")
    al <- read.csv(f_cache, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  }

  # ---- Detect column names (robust to schema changes) ----
  nms <- names(al)

  smarts_col <- nms[grep("smarts", nms, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]

  # rule_set numeric (e.g., 2,3,4...) if present
  rule_set_col <- nms[grep("^rule.?set$|rule_set", nms, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]

  # rule_set_name (e.g., PAINS, Glaxo, GSK...) if present
  set_name_col <- nms[grep("rule.?set.?name|set_name|ruleset_name|rule_set_name", nms, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]

  # rule_id numeric
  id_col <- nms[grep("^rule.?id$|rule_id", nms, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]

  # description/name field (human readable), best-effort
  desc_col <- nms[grep("description|desc|name|alert_name|label", nms, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]

  if (is.na(smarts_col) || is.na(id_col) || (is.na(rule_set_col) && is.na(set_name_col))) {
    stop(
      "Could not detect required columns in alert CSV. Found columns: ",
      paste(nms, collapse = ", ")
    )
  }

  # ---- Normalize ----
  alerts <- dplyr::as_tibble(al) %>%
    dplyr::transmute(
      rule_set      = if (!is.na(rule_set_col)) as.integer(.data[[rule_set_col]]) else NA_integer_,
      rule_set_name = if (!is.na(set_name_col)) as.character(.data[[set_name_col]]) else NA_character_,
      rule_id       = suppressWarnings(as.integer(.data[[id_col]])),
      description   = if (!is.na(desc_col)) as.character(.data[[desc_col]]) else NA_character_,
      smarts        = as.character(.data[[smarts_col]])
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(smarts), nzchar(smarts)) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(rule_id)) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      # if rule_set_name missing, fall back to rule_set as text
      rule_set_name = dplyr::if_else(
        is.na(rule_set_name) | !nzchar(rule_set_name),
        ifelse(!is.na(rule_set), paste0("RuleSet_", rule_set), "UnknownSet"),
        rule_set_name
      ),
      # stable ID uses numeric rule_set if available; else build stable-ish id from set_name
      alert_id = dplyr::if_else(
        !is.na(rule_set),
        paste0(rule_set, ":", rule_id),
        paste0(rule_set_name, ":", rule_id)
      ),
      # human-readable label
      label = dplyr::if_else(
        !is.na(description) & nzchar(description),
        paste0(alert_id, " | ", rule_set_name, " | ", description),
        paste0(alert_id, " | ", rule_set_name)
      )
    )

  # ---- Split and compile patterns ----
  split(alerts, alerts$rule_set_name) %>%
    purrr::map(function(d) {
      tibble::tibble(
        rule_set_name = d$rule_set_name[1],
        rule_set      = d$rule_set[1],
        rule_id       = d$rule_id,
        alert_id      = d$alert_id,
        description   = d$description,
        smarts        = d$smarts,
        label         = d$label,
        patt          = purrr::map(d$smarts, ~ tryCatch(Chem$MolFromSmarts(.x), error = function(e) NULL))
      ) %>%
        dplyr::filter(!purrr::map_lgl(patt, is.null))
    })
}

compiled_sets <- get_alerts()

flag_molecule <- function(smi, compiled_sets) {
  mol <- safe_mol(smi)
  if (is.null(mol)) return("")
  
  hits <- c()
  
  for (set_name in names(compiled_sets)) {
    tbl <- compiled_sets[[set_name]]
    
    matched <- purrr::map_lgl(tbl$patt, ~ mol$HasSubstructMatch(.x))
    
    if (any(matched)) {
      hits <- c(hits, tbl$label[matched])
    }
  }
  
  if (length(hits) == 0) {
    ""
  } else {
    paste(unique(hits), collapse = " | ")
  }
}


calc_lipinski <- function(smi) {
  mol <- safe_mol(smi)
  if (is.null(mol)) {
    return(tibble::tibble(MW = NA_real_, LogP = NA_real_, HBD = NA_real_, 
                          HBA = NA_real_, Lipinski = NA_character_, 
                          Lipinski_Passed = NA_character_, Lipinski_Failed = NA_character_))
  }
  
  MW <- as.numeric(Desc$MolWt(mol))
  LogP <- as.numeric(Crip$MolLogP(mol))
  HBD <- as.numeric(Lip$NumHDonors(mol))
  HBA <- as.numeric(Lip$NumHAcceptors(mol))
  
  passed <- c(
    if (!is.na(MW) && MW <= 500) "MW<=500",
    if (!is.na(LogP) && LogP <= 5) "LogP<=5",
    if (!is.na(HBD) && HBD <= 5) "HBD<=5",
    if (!is.na(HBA) && HBA <= 10) "HBA<=10"
  )
  
  failed <- c(
    if (!is.na(MW) && MW > 500) "MW>500",
    if (!is.na(LogP) && LogP > 5) "LogP>5",
    if (!is.na(HBD) && HBD > 5) "HBD>5",
    if (!is.na(HBA) && HBA > 10) "HBA>10"
  )
  
  tibble::tibble(
    MW = MW, LogP = LogP, HBD = HBD, HBA = HBA,
    Lipinski = if (length(failed) == 0) "Pass" else "Fail",
    Lipinski_Passed = paste(passed, collapse = ", "),
    Lipinski_Failed = paste(failed, collapse = ", ")
  )
}
# ============================================================
# 6) Compute properties for unique SMILES
# ============================================================
unique_smiles <- df_hits %>%
  filter(!is.na(SMILES_used), SMILES_used != "") %>%
  distinct(SMILES_used)

cat("Computing properties for", nrow(unique_smiles), "unique SMILES...\n")
smis <- unique_smiles$SMILES_used
n <- length(smis)

pb <- progress::progress_bar$new(
  format = "RDKit [:bar] :current/:total :percent | eta: :eta",
  total  = n,
  clear  = FALSE,
  width  = 60
)

properties_list <- vector("list", n)

for (i in seq_len(n)) {
  pb$tick()

  smi <- smis[i]

  flags <- flag_molecule(smi, compiled_sets)
  props <- calc_lipinski(smi)

  properties_list[[i]] <- cbind(
    tibble::tibble(SMILES_used = smi, alert_flags = flags),
    props
  )
}

properties_tbl <- dplyr::bind_rows(properties_list)

# ============================================================
# 7) Join properties and calculate risk scores
# ============================================================
```
